title: Indulgent Japanese Tahini Bao
description: A rich and earthy fusion of Japanese flavors with creamy tahini and crispy double-fried chicken, perfect for a comforting meal or snack.
instructions: Combine tahini, sesame seeds, and miso paste in a bowl and whisk until smooth.
Add sushi rice vinegar, whisked with sugar and salt, to the tahini mixture and stir well.
Cut double-fried KFC-style chicken breast into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat and saut00 the chicken pieces until golden brown and crispy.
Add the chicken to the tahini mixture and stir well to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and garnish with green onions, pickled ginger, sesame seeds, and cilantro.
Brush the sesame seeds with sesame oil and sprinkle on top of the dish.
Garnish with additional sesame seeds and cilantro if desired.
Adjust seasoning with soy sauce and sake if needed.
Serve with steamed buns for a delicious Japanese-inspired meal or snack.
